name: subcog
description: Persistent memory system for AI coding assistants. Captures decisions, learnings, and context from coding sessions. Features hybrid search (semantic + BM25), MCP server integration, SQLite persistence with knowledge graph, and proactive memory surfacing. Written in Rust.
